userGoal: Finish a multilingual permit readiness application without breaking project rules.
currentTask: Audit and fix visible UI strings so every user-facing phrase uses the i18n/LanguageContext system.
importantRules: Every visible UI string must use the i18n/LanguageContext system.
Do not hardcode user-facing strings in components.
Preserve the existing app behavior while localizing visible text.
knownErrors: TypeScript may fail if a translation key is missing from one language.
decisionsAlreadyMade: Use the existing LanguageContext provider instead of adding a second i18n library.
nextSteps: Search components for hardcoded visible strings.
Add missing translation keys across all required languages.
